feed.title: Bare Metal Cloud Status - Incident History

entry.title: [LIM1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack L121B09 maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 28, 07:00 - 09:00 UTC

Apr 30, 22:20 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Start time : 28/05/2026 07:00 UTC
End time : 28/05/2026 09:00 UTC
Service impact : During this maintenance, the servers in the affected rack will be gracefully shut down beforehand. Customers hosted on these servers should expect a planned service interruption for the duration of the maintenance window.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [YYZ][Network] - Network equipment maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 21, 17:30 - 18:30 UTC

May 7, 19:33 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our network infrastructure.

Start time : 21/05/2026 17:30 UTC
End time : 21/05/2026 18:30 UTC
Service impact : Customers who have not configured the LACP service may temporarily experience a service interruption.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will have to carry out interventions on multiple network equipment.

List of concerned rack :
- Rack YYZ0101C03B


Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [WAW1][Dedicated Servers] - Racks W17A09 - W17A10 - W17A11 - W17A14 - W17B08 Maintenance Notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 19, 06:00 - 10:00 UTC

Apr 23, 14:13 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Bare Metal offer.

List of affected racks:

- Rack W17A09
- Rack W17A10
- Rack W17A11
- Rack W17A14
- Rack W17B08

Start time : 19/05/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 19/05/2026 10:00 UTC
Service impact : All servers will be unavailable during maintenance.
Service improvement : Following our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will be doing a maintenance on multiple network equipment.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [RBX2][Dedicated Servers] - Rack 23A06 maintenance notification

THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 17, 23:00 UTC  -  May 18, 01:00 UTC

May 1, 19:33 UTC

Start time : 17/05/2026 23:00 UTC
End time : 18/05/2026 01:00 UTC
Service impact : Servers in rack 23A06 will be temporarily unavailable during the maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

entry.title: [BHS7][Dedicated Servers] - Rack B707B15 incident notification
entry.content:
May 10, 00:56 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Dedicated Servers offer on the specific rack B707B15.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 09/05/2026 23:37 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Servers in the specified rack are no longer able to access the public network.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers via public network located on the specified rack.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a network equipment issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 9, 23:51 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering, which is causing temporary availability issue in the rack B707B15.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 09/05/2026 23:37 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Servers in the specified rack are no longer able to access the public network.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers via public network located on the specified rack.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [BHS8][Dedicated Servers] - Rack BHS0814B03A Incident Notification
entry.content:
May 9, 00:01 UTC
Resolved - We had an incident on Dedicated Servers offer in rack which has now been resolved.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 08/05/2026 23:36 UTC
End time : 08/05/2026 23:44 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some servers in the rack BHS0814B03A were temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers were temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified rack.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.

We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout this incident.

entry.title: [BHS4][Dedicated Servers] - Rows T04C/T04D Incident Notification
entry.content:
May 8, 23:47 UTC

Here is the list of impacted racks :
- T04C28
- T04C29
- T04C30
- T04C31

- T04D31

Start time : 08/05/2026 22:51 UTC
End time : 08/05/2026 22:54 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some servers in the specified racks were no longer able to access the public network.
Customers Impact : Some customers were temporarily unable to access their servers via public network located on the specified racks.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.

We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout this incident.

entry.title: [RBX8][Dedicated Servers] - Racks R802R13/R802R14/R802R15 Incident Notification
entry.content:
May 8, 22:22 UTC
Resolved - We had an incident on Dedicated Servers offer in racks R802R13/R802R14/R802R15 which has now been resolved.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 08/05/2026 22:03 UTC
End time : 08/05/2026 22:14 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Servers in the specified rack were no longer able to access via the IPMI interface.
Customers Impact : Customers were temporarily unable to access their servers via the IPMI interface located on the specified racks.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a cooling system issue.

We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout this incident.

entry.title: [RBX7][Storage and Backups] - Backup Storage maintenance notification
entry.content:
May 8, 04:09 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

May 7, 14:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 4, 08:53 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our Backup Storage offer.

Start time : 07/05/2026 14:00 UTC
End time : 08/05/2026 02:00 UTC
Service impact : During the maintenance window, some storage will be temporarily unavailable for approximately 30 minutes.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Backup Storage offering to implement security and performance enhancements.

Thank you for your understanding.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

Root Cause : This incident is caused by a network equipment issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [SBG3][Cooling System] - Rack S355A03 maintenance notification
entry.content:
May 7, 14:58 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

May 7, 06:40 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 7, 06:39 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Start time : 07/05/2026 06:40 UTC
End time : 07/05/2026 15:00 UTC
Service impact : During this maintenance, the cooling system's efficiency may be temporarily reduced for some servers, potentially lowering performance. Despite ongoing mitigation efforts, customers could still experience a temporary reboot or shutdown in the worst case.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [RBX8][Dedicated Servers] - Rack R805R05 incident notification
entry.content:

Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering has been resolved.

Start time : 06/05/2026 21:25 UTC
End time : 07/05/2026 02:00 UTC

Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

May 6, 23:16 UTC
Update - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : The vRack network is available again
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 6, 21:58 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Dedicated Servers offer on the specific rack.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 06/05/2026 21:56 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Servers in the specified rack are no longer able to access the vRack network.
Some servers in the rack R805R05 are temporarily unavailable too.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers via vRack network located on the specified rack.
Some customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified rack too.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a cooling system issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 6, 21:30 UTC

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 06/05/2026 21:25 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Servers in the specified rack are no longer able to access the vRack network.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers via vRack network located on the specified rack.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.
